artifacts.summary: Analysis of 3 coverage sorries in ClosedFlagIntBFMCS bridge pattern; proposes direct multi-family construction where families = discreteClosedMCS members, eliminating modal coverage sorries while F/P sorries remain as documented blockers

Naming convention analysis from reports 17-20: distinguishes MCS (world states) from D (time indices), proposes variable naming guidelines (w/u/v for states, t/s for times), identifies W=D conflation anti-pattern, provides concrete recommendations for task 22 implementation

partial_progress.details: Analyzed reports 17-20 for naming conventions, created supplementary report

core_distinction.world_states: MCS - instantaneous semantic content (WHAT is true)
core_distinction.history_bundle: BFMCS - set of histories with modal coherence

key_findings.anti_pattern_documented: W=D conflation (WorldState := D) in deprecated files
